title: PHY: Multi-channel rendezvous and scheduled cells
description: Optional CCP v1 multi-channel capacity profile. CH0 remains universal for routing, multicast, emergency, legacy, join, and fallback traffic. Unscheduled immediate neighbors use signed bounded CHANNEL_REQUEST/GRANT rendezvous; scheduled nodes use root-authorized channel cells. Nodes never scan blindly or advertise a persistent off-channel receive frequency. Regional plans are local/versioned, single-radio and parallel-radio capability are distinct, and remote messages cannot expand legal frequencies or budgets. Same-channel spatial reuse and synchronized network-wide hopping are deferred. Capacity is measured, not inferred from channel count.
design: Normative protocol is spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. Multi-channel production work is blocked by TDMA timing simulation i9r0.2 and combined capacity simulation da2q.3.
acceptance_criteria: Spec issue closed; canonical simulator gates demonstrate rendezvous correctness, regulatory safety, interoperability, and required paired-seed capacity thresholds before implementation begins.
